title: High accuracy of mv position
abstract: High accuracy of MV position is described. One example method includes selecting, for a conversion between a current block of video and a bitstream representation of the current block, a first block for affine inheritance of the current block; deriving motion vectors (MVs) of the current block by aligning a representative position of the first block to a position of a MV of the first block used to conduct the affine inherence; and perform the conversion by using the derived motion vectors (MVs) of the current block.
